DB.description: D1 database used to store notes, tags, attachments, and auth rate-limit records.

ATTACHMENTS.description: R2 bucket used to store note attachments.

ADMIN_USERNAME.description: Single-user login name. Defaults to admin.

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Single-user login password. Use a strong random value in production.

COOKIE_SECRET.description: Long random secret used to sign the HttpOnly session cookie.
